title: Wax Melt Burner Wax burner Ceramic Oil Burners Assorted Wax Warmer Aromatherapy Holder Candle Scented Diffuser Home Bedroom Decor Flower Pattern
features: Ceramic Wax Melt Burners: Made of Top-Quality Porcelain And Fired At 1300℃ Optimum Temperature, Finished With A Layer Of Glossy Mineral-Glaze. Exquisite Craft & Reliable Quality For Every Family.High Temperature Resistant And Easily Washed.

Fantastic Design : MAOUYWIEE Flower Pattern Oil Burner, come with ceramic spoons. Easy to place in and out put, no more worry your finger will be hurt by the candle fire; Big mouth design effectively extends the burning time of essential oil, pleasant and clean aromas spread from the oil diffuser. Diffuse Slowly and Time Lasting.

Excellent Decoration : Catching the eyes of somebody who pass by in Day, It's a good choice for home and office decoration; Amazing nocturnal effect, beautiful and bright enough, It's no doubt the Lead-Role of the Night !
Multifuction Application : Used as an aromatic tool for oils and candles, also can be worked as a night light. It can be mixed wet and dry.

Product Specification : MAOUYWIEE Flower Ceramic Oil Burner x 1 ( 10.8cm x 10cm ) , Candle Spoon x 1 ( 8.3cm x 4.6cm ). Satisfaction Warranty : We Provide Free Return & Exchange for Product Damaged, Not Satisfied, Accidental Purchase,etc.
description: Product Description Essential Oil Burners Wax Melt Burners Main Features : - Flower Pattern: Pretty floral casts the warm candlelight throughout the burner, calm down your mind and make you relax. - Candle Spoon: Come with tealight spoons for easy place in and out put, no more worry your finger will be hurt by the candle fire. - Large Capacity: Up to 90ml capacity, just add oil/wax melts one time and go to bed. Comfortable atmosphere helps you relax With the simmering of essential oil, tealight holder breathes its fragrance of romantics all around your sweet room. Its pleasant aroma and flickering light help to relax yourself well after all-day work. Characteristic Design The oil burner with hollowed-out twinkling floral patterns will beautifully brighten up your indoor living space. Elegant decoration for you sweet night. Best gift idea The white ceramic oil burner beautifully decorates your home and office, pleasant fragrance and warmly light revitalize you, so the aroma burner will be an excellent gift for birthday, wedding, party and Holidays. Specifications - 1 x Flower Pattern Oil Burner (Height: 11.5cm, Diameter: 10.5cm) - 1 x Candle Spoon (Inner Diameter: 3.5cm) Don't leave it unattended. Be aware of high heat when using. After the water burned out, the dish will be very hot, you cannot pour cool water into the dish. Don’t put them in the dishwasher.
